description: Design audit benchmark corpus — reference sites for calibration and reproducibility testing

world-class.description: Sites that should score 8-10. If they don't, the audit prompt is miscalibrated.

sites.notes: Gold standard SaaS design. Clean typography, consistent spacing, excellent dark mode.
Best-in-class marketing site. Gradient mastery, micro-interactions, impeccable typography.
Minimal, precise. Great use of whitespace, consistent component system.
Polished landing page. Excellent visual hierarchy, smooth animations.
Clean dev tool marketing. Good typography, slightly less polished than Stripe.

good.description: Professional sites that should score 6-8. Solid but not exceptional.

sites.notes: Functional, consistent, but dense. Navigation complexity is intentional.
Clean marketing with good illustrations. App itself is more complex.
Developer docs done well. Good code examples, clean layout.

average.description: Functional but uninspired sites that should score 4-6.

sites.notes: Intentionally minimal. No design system, raw HTML. Should score very low.
Functional minimalism. No CSS framework, table layout. Score should reflect this.

vibecoded.description: AI-generated or template-default apps that should score 3-5 with the vibecoded profile.

sites.notes: shadcn docs themselves are well-designed. But auditing with vibecoded profile tests template detection.

defi.description: DeFi/crypto sites for the defi profile.

sites.notes: Best-in-class DEX UI. Clean swap interface, good mobile support.
Complex lending UI done well. Dense data presentation.

reproducibilityTarget.description: Scores should be within ±0.5 stddev across 3 runs of the same site.
